caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied back, wearing a black t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, sits in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a dark screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text. To her left, a logo is visible with the text "PODCAST," and to her right, another logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" alongside smaller text that says "by 11 logo studio." In the upper right corner of the background, the words "Employee Only" are partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains seated and looks slightly to her left with a neutral expression, showing minimal movement in her posture and facial features as the scene progresses.
